Order.cancelled: Payment was cancelled. You can submit the form again.
Order.emailHint: We will send the report to this address.
Order.phoneHint: Backup contact in case email is entered incorrectly.
Order.listingHint: Please provide the exact listing URL. Every link is checked manually.
Order.summaryNote: One-time payment for the selected PROVIN report (MINI €39.99 or AUDIT €99.99): preparation and PDF delivery by email, usually within 48h after successful payment.
Order.stripeNote: Secure payment with Stripe, card and Apple/Google Pay.
Order.checkoutConsent: I confirm that I have read the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
Order.checkoutConsentAria: Confirmation: terms, privacy policy, authorization for PROVIN to obtain data, immediate execution, waiver of withdrawal right
Order.operatorPageIntro: Internal form without payment — after creation the admin workspace opens.
Order.operatorNote: No Stripe — the order appears in admin as “Manual”.

errors.withdrawalRequired: To continue to payment, please tick the confirmation (terms, privacy policy, authorization and withdrawal terms).
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from this address. Please wait a moment and try again.

validation.step1Both: Please enter a valid VIN code or plate number.
validation.vin: Please enter a valid VIN code (17 characters) or license plate number (3–6 characters).
validation.url: Please enter a valid listing URL.
validation.listing: Please enter a valid listing URL.
validation.phone: Please enter a phone number with at least 8 digits (with or without +371).
